'''roshakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labioglossal|labioglossal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labioglossal|labioglossal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| roshakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:roshakithi|roshakithi]] || [[word:roshakiji|roshakiji]] || [[word:roshakishi|roshakishi]] || [[word:roshakiki|roshakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:roshakuthuthu|roshakuthuthu]] || [[word:roshakujuju|roshakujuju]] || [[word:roshakushushu|roshakushushu]] || [[word:roshakukuku|roshakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:roshakuthu|roshakuthu]] || [[word:roshakuju|roshakuju]] || [[word:roshakushu|roshakushu]] || [[word:roshakuku|roshakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:roshakufthuf|roshakufthuf]] || [[word:roshakufjuf|roshakufjuf]] || [[word:roshakufshuf|roshakufshuf]] || [[word:roshakufkuf|roshakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:roshakethe|roshakethe]] || [[word:roshakeje|roshakeje]] || [[word:roshakeshe|roshakeshe]] || [[word:roshakeke|roshakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:roshakothotho|roshakothotho]] || [[word:roshakojojo|roshakojojo]] || [[word:roshakoshosho|roshakoshosho]] || [[word:roshakokoko|roshakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:roshakotho|roshakotho]] || [[word:roshakojo|roshakojo]] || [[word:roshakosho|roshakosho]] || [[word:roshakoko|roshakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:roshakofthof|roshakofthof]] || [[word:roshakofjof|roshakofjof]] || [[word:roshakofshof|roshakofshof]] || [[word:roshakofkof|roshakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:roshakïfthïf|roshakïfthïf]] || [[word:roshakïfjïf|roshakïfjïf]] || [[word:roshakïfshïf|roshakïfshïf]] || [[word:roshakïfkïf|roshakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:roshakïfthïfthïf|roshakïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:roshakïfjïfjïf|roshakïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:roshakïfshïfshïf|roshakïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:roshakïfkïfkïf|roshakïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:roshakïfthïf|roshakïfthïf]] || [[word:roshakïfjïf|roshakïfjïf]] || [[word:roshakïfshïf|roshakïfshïf]] || [[word:roshakïfkïf|roshakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:roshakïfthïf|roshakïfthïf]] || [[word:roshakïfjïf|roshakïfjïf]] || [[word:roshakïfshïf|roshakïfshïf]] || [[word:roshakïfkïf|roshakïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:roshakæthæ|roshakæthæ]] || [[word:roshakæjæ|roshakæjæ]] || [[word:roshakæshæ|roshakæshæ]] || [[word:roshakækæ|roshakækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:roshakathatha|roshakathatha]] || [[word:roshakajaja|roshakajaja]] || [[word:roshakashasha|roshakashasha]] || [[word:roshakakaka|roshakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:roshakatha|roshakatha]] || [[word:roshakaja|roshakaja]] || [[word:roshakasha|roshakasha]] || [[word:roshakaka|roshakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:roshakafthaf|roshakafthaf]] || [[word:roshakafjaf|roshakafjaf]] || [[word:roshakafshaf|roshakafshaf]] || [[word:roshakafkaf|roshakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:roshakasha|roshakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:roshakshësha|roshakshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:roshakrosha|roshakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:roshakmusha|roshakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:roshakyasha|roshakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroshaknkshësha|goroshaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroshaknkrosha|goroshaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroshaknkmusha|goroshaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroshaknkyasha|goroshaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:roshashakasha|roshashakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:roshashakshësha|roshashakshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:roshashakrosha|roshashakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:roshashakmusha|roshashakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:roshashakyasha|roshashakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroshashaknkshësha|goroshashaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroshashaknkrosha|goroshashaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroshashaknkmusha|goroshashaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroshashaknkyasha|goroshashaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:reshækasha|reshækasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:reshækshësha|reshækshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:reshækrosha|reshækrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:reshækmusha|reshækmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:reshækyasha|reshækyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goreshæknkshësha|goreshæknkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goreshæknkrosha|goreshæknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goreshæknkmusha|goreshæknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goreshæknkyasha|goreshæknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:roshfakasha|roshfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:roshfakshësha|roshfakshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:roshfakrosha|roshfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:roshfakmusha|roshfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:roshfakyasha|roshfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goroshfaknkshësha|goroshfaknkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goroshfaknkrosha|goroshfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goroshfaknkmusha|goroshfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goroshfaknkyasha|goroshfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
